Text

Course Vocabulary Index (Week 1 ) 12）

Here is a list of all the vocabulary we will study in this course, in which lesson you can find it and with English translation. You can also download the list here: Course Vocabulary Index (Week 1-12).pdf


Course Vocabulary Index（Week 1 - 12）

hiragana/katakana
kanji
meaning
week
day
